purpose: Per-dashboard project configuration modal. Resolves the active project path with priority: dashboard-scoped (localStorage via getDashboardProject) → global settings.activeProjectPath fallback (skipped for chat dashboards). Lets the user pick a directory (api.selectProjectDirectory native dialog), shows recent-projects list (api.getRecentProjects), CLI provider toggle (claude / codex) with hard-coded MODEL_OPTIONS lists, CLI binary path with auto-detection (api.detectAgentCli) status indicator, default model dropdown that resolves to the first option if saved value is invalid, dangerouslySkipPermissions toggle, and an Additional Context Directories list (also dashboard-scoped via dashboardProjects helpers) for adding extra read-only context dirs to worker prompts. On Save, persists the chosen project path to dashboard scope; otherwise clears it.
gotchas: Chat-mode dashboards (id startsWith 'chat-agent-' or 'pending-chat') deliberately do NOT inherit the global activeProjectPath fallback. This prevents a stale code-mode project from resurfacing in chat-mode after the user clears it. Modifying this guard could leak project context across modes.
`pristine` flag opens the picker with NO active project pre-selected (used for new-chat flow) and ALSO returns an empty additionalDirs list — both matter; do not just gate one side.
MODEL_OPTIONS is HARDCODED with current model names (claude-opus-4-7, gpt-5.4, etc.) — when models change, this list must be updated manually. There is no dynamic discovery from the CLI.

resolveModel auto-falls-back to options[0].value if savedModel is unknown for the active provider — and silently writes the new resolved value back to settings. Switching provider can invisibly mutate the persisted defaultModel.
selectProjectDirectory then loadProject is two IPC calls; on cancel, dirPath is null and the chain short-circuits (no error). loadProject errors are swallowed with .catch(()=>{}) — silent failures.
addDashboardAdditionalContext blocks adding the active project as additional context (currentProject.path === dirPath check) — silently no-ops, no user feedback.
Save handler ALWAYS calls onClose() — there is no validation gate (e.g. if cliFound===false and currentProject is set, save proceeds; the worker spawn will then fail downstream).
The modal renders inside Modal with a footer prop — note this is one of the few modals using the footer drawer pattern.
patterns: Dashboard-scoped settings via localStorage (dashboardProjects helpers) — same pattern used by ChatInstanceView and PlanningModal for additional-context dirs.
Three-tier project resolution: pristine override → per-dashboard → global fallback (with chat exception).
Per-provider sub-state: cliPath, defaultModel, MODEL_OPTIONS keyed by provider — clean swap when provider changes.
conventions: dirBasename helper extracts last path segment for display.
